title: Sulr'mon
description: A properly Stable Pixelmon modpack with some QOL mods.
body:
# Welcome to Sulr'mon!
After browsing all the different Pixelmon modpacks out there I noticed a **significant** lack in quality or personal usability. So here we are.

This modpack has lots of mods to really smooth out the overworld and all other dimentions. It features **Terralith, Incendium, and Nullscape to really change up your environment. On top of that we have Structory, all the Moog structures, Distant Horizons, and Falling Tree's to really pull it all together.**

Aside from the beauty it also has **Traveler's Backpack, Vein Mining (Enchant), Waystones, Loot Beams, Mouse Tweaks, and a few other QOL mods.**

Now I hope you enjoy this modpack as much as I do!
Thank you!!
